goal: Brand-layer theme-aware refactor for live OMK//CONTROL chrome using Adaptorch MCP routing: make active omk.theme.v1 theme drive src/brand palette, cockpit header/subtitle, tmux chrome label, and HUD/control surfaces. Preserve night-city byte-identical by default, wire rust-forge to oxidized forge chrome, keep package version 0.78.6 dynamic, update tests and evidence. Exclude concurrent worker files AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, src/providers/*, fable proof/tests.
summary: Completed the live brand-layer theme-aware refactor. Night City remains the default/byte-compatible brand chrome; rust-forge now drives live OMK//CONTROL cockpit/tmux/HUD chrome as Oxidized Forge via active omk.theme.v1 snapshots and semantic-role palette resolution. Reviewer-requested fix landed so OMK_THEME=rust-forge wins over default chat brand=omk in tmux layout. Version footer remains dynamic from package.json and renders omk v0.78.6.
evidence: Implementation commit: 2f780ea feat(brand): make live OMK control chrome theme-aware

Tmux coverage composes helper output rather than attaching to a real tmux session.
Concurrent provider/fable worker changes remain uncommitted and intentionally excluded.
